profile_backed_target.source: fresh fixed-worker RCH target-only baseline after frankenjax-o84i1 paired-panel rejection

lever.summary: Pack each thread row-block's full MR-row A slabs once per KC block in [row_tile][k][row] layout before sweeping packed-B NR panels

isomorphism_proof.ordering: The pc-block loop, j-panel loop, i-tile loop, and inner l=0..kc product sweep remain in the same order for every output element; packing changes only the address from which each A scalar is read after a one-time copy.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparisons or tie-breaking behavior in matmul_2d.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No FMA, mixed precision, horizontal reduction, reassociation, or change to accumulator seed/writeback behavior; each output cell keeps ascending-k accumulation and the same running-C continuation across pc blocks.
isomorphism_proof.shape_dtype_error_surface: Shape checks, dtype dispatch, thread row ownership, row-major output layout, packed-B layout, and border handling are unchanged.

validation.focused_test_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-zntc3-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
validation.focused_test_result: passed: 9 passed, 0 failed, 1 ignored, 1163 filtered out
validation.check_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-zntc3-check cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets
validation.clippy_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-zntc3-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings
validation.ubs_result: exit 0; no critical findings; fmt/clippy/check/test-build sections clean; remaining warnings are pre-existing file-wide inventory surfaces

benchmark.baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-zntc3-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10
benchmark.after_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-zntc3-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10

decision.reason: Same-worker median speedup 1.403x and conservative speedup 1.210x clear the Score>=2.0 campaign gate with unchanged behavior proof.
decision.next_primitive: Reprofile after landing; continue GEMM/linalg work with a deeper JC-blocked/packed-B-and-packed-A macro-kernel, cache-oblivious GEMM, or the next top RCH linalg row.
